description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a tall, uniform hedge, creating a private yard. The front features a wide covered porch with steps leading up, supported by columns and bordered by a low railing. The exterior walls are clad in blue siding, with white trim around the windows and doors, and a prominent gable roof covers the main living area. A driveway leads to an attached garage on one side, while the backyard and side yards are enclosed by the same tall hedge. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, and the house includes a visible chimney and multiple entry points. The landscaping is minimal, focusing on the hedge boundary and a small patch of grass at the front.
description: A single-story blue bungalow with a wide front porch, attached garage, and surrounded by a tall hedge for privacy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide porch, steps, garage, and main entrance, with the hedge enclosing the yard.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the tall hedge, with the garage and part of the roof visible behind the greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the bungalow, the gable roof, and the symmetrical hedge enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the driveway, garage, and hedge, offering a glimpse of the porch roof and side windows.
